upstreams.name: rust-demo
upstreams.description: Demo upstream — sanity tools: echo, add, system_info, random_uuid

upstreams.name: agentmemory
upstreams.description: Agent memory engine (rohitg00/agentmemory v0.9.22): smart search, recall/save, sessions, audit, governance-delete. Standalone fallback uses InMemoryKV — set AGENTMEMORY_URL to a running agentmemory daemon for SQLite persistence.
